name: ClickHouse
routeName: ClickHouse Cloud free trial + web SQL console
firstSuccessOutcome: A free ClickHouse Cloud service is running and the web SQL console returns your databases.

steps.action: Open ClickHouse Cloud quick start docs
Click Get started to reach sign-up page
Create account via email or Google/Microsoft SSO
Verify email via link within 24 hours
Log in with your new credentials
Onboarding wizard: choose region, name service
Wait for service to provision
Open web SQL console, run SHOW databases
See four databases listed confirming connection

name: SingleStore
routeName: Helios Free Shared Edition + SQL Editor
firstSuccessOutcome: A free Shared workspace with an attached database returns results in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

steps.action: Open SingleStore Helios getting-started guide
Go to Cloud Portal at portal.singlestore.com
Sign up with email, Google, or Microsoft
Log in to the Cloud Portal
Create free Shared workspace with attached database
Open SQL Editor, run a SELECT query
See query results from your shared database

name: TiDB Cloud
routeName: TiDB Cloud Starter (free) + AI SQL Editor
firstSuccessOutcome: A free auto-created Starter instance runs a query in the console SQL Editor and shows results.

steps.action: Open TiDB Cloud Quick Start docs
Click sign-up link for TiDB Cloud
Sign up with email or Google/GitHub/Microsoft SSO
Log in to TiDB Cloud console
Default Starter instance auto-created for new users
Open SQL Editor, write and run query
See query results and logs below editor

name: Tiger Data
routeName: Tiger Cloud 5-minute quickstart + Console SQL Editor
firstSuccessOutcome: A Tiger Cloud service is running and a hypertable query returns inserted rows in the Console.

steps.action: Open Tiger Data 5-minute quickstart docs
Open Sign up for Tiger Cloud, add details
Click Start your free trial to register
Confirm email via the link received
Log into Tiger Console
Create service (Real-time analytics), pick region and size
Wait for service to be ready
In SQL Editor create hypertable, insert, query
See your rows returned, most recent first

name: Weaviate Cloud
routeName: Free cluster + Console Collections tool (sample data)
firstSuccessOutcome: A free-forever Weaviate cluster holds a sample collection you can explore in the console.

steps.action: Open Weaviate Cloud quickstart and create-cluster docs
Go to Weaviate Cloud console to register
Create account and log into console
Click plus, select Free, name cluster, create
Wait 1-3 minutes for cluster provisioning
Collections tool: create sample collection with data
Click Explore data to view collection objects

name: YugabyteDB
routeName: YugabyteDB Aeon free Sandbox + Cloud Shell
firstSuccessOutcome: A free Sandbox cluster is running and pre-built YSQL queries return results in Cloud Shell.

steps.action: Open YugabyteDB Aeon quick start docs
Sign up for a YugabyteDB Aeon account
Create account and log in
Create Cluster wizard: select Sandbox, provider, region
Download admin database credentials
Wait about 5 minutes for provisioning
Click Connect, launch Cloud Shell with YSQL
Enter admin database password in Cloud Shell
Run pre-built queries from Quick Start guide
See results confirming distributed SQL works

name: Zilliz Cloud
firstSuccessOutcome: A free Zilliz cluster is running and a sample collection loads for search in the console.

steps.action: Open Zilliz Cloud getting-started and free-trials docs
Go to the Zilliz Cloud sign-up page
Register with email, Google, or GitHub
Verify email with confirmation code
Log in and complete basic info
Create Cluster, choose Free, set name and region
Save cluster credentials shown only once
Wait until cluster status becomes Running
Create sample collection with predefined data
Collection loads; explore and search sample data
